texto: He put the x-ray up on the light screen: The tumor was a large white circle in the middle of the picture. It looked like a headlight coming straight at me, full-speed ahead.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mike Lingenfelter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “He put the x-ray up on the light screen: The tumor was a large white circle in the middle of the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, cancer, light pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
